use_case: Multilingual automatic speech recognition and translation
notes: Encoder-decoder transformer trained on 680K hours of weakly supervised audio. Supports 99 languages and handles noisy environments better than smaller variants.
quick_start:
from transformers import pipeline
asr = pipeline('automatic-speech-recognition', model='openai/whisper-large-v3', device='cuda')
result = asr('audio.mp3')
print(result['text'])

use_case: English automatic speech recognition with fine-tuning ready architecture
notes: Self-supervised pretraining on 960 hours of Librispeech followed by CTC fine-tuning. Excellent base for domain adaptation on English audio with labeled data.
quick_start:
from transformers import Wav2Vec2Processor, Wav2Vec2ForCTC
processor = Wav2Vec2Processor.from_pretrained('facebook/wav2vec2-large-960h')
model = Wav2Vec2ForCTC.from_pretrained('facebook/wav2vec2-large-960h')
